title: Operation of Month End Close Controls - Trial Balance Review - GLO
sourceFiles: Operation of Month End Close Controls  - Trial Balance Review - GLO (1).pdf

timeline.description: Setup: roll forward prior month file, update parameters and master data.
Extract TB from PSGL/S4 and load into variance analysis file.
Variance calculation, commentary collection, investigation, risk assessment.
Internal review, incorporate changes, send FORTM pack summary.

states.name: Prepare Schedule Work Day
states.description: Month-end close cycle begins.

states.name: Roll Forward Prior Month File
states.description: Copy prior month's TB working file as basis for current month.

states.name: Download PSGL Master Account File
states.description: Download latest PSGL/S4 master account data.

states.name: Update Accounts Master Sheet
states.description: Refresh accounts master sheet with latest PSGL data.

states.name: Update Parameters and Comparatives to Reflect Current Period
states.description: Set period parameters and comparative figures for current month.

states.name: Extract Trial Balance
states.description: Extract TB data from PSGL/S4 via SC Bridge into working file.

states.name: Update TB Details in Variance Analysis File
states.description: Load extracted TB data into the variance analysis file.

states.name: Calculate Variance Between Prior Month and Current
states.description: Compute period-over-period variances for all GL accounts.

states.name: Filter Variances Based on Set Criteria
states.description: Apply materiality thresholds and filters to identify significant variances.

states.name: Check for Material Variances
states.description: Decision: are there material variances requiring commentary?

states.name: Seek Commentaries on Variances
states.description: Request variance explanations from country stakeholders.

states.name: Receive Commentaries on Variances
states.description: Wait for and collect variance explanations from stakeholders.

states.name: Update Commentaries in Variance File
states.description: Record received commentaries in the variance analysis file.

states.name: Update Variance Commentaries
states.description: Finalize and validate all variance commentaries.

states.name: Is the Journal Posted?
states.description: Check status of related journal entries.

transitions.condition: Journal Posted, No further action required

states.name: Send Request to Post Journal
states.description: Request journal posting from responsible team.

states.name: Check if Further Investigation Required
states.description: Determine if additional investigation is needed for entries.

states.name: Check with Respective Team on Entries Status
states.description: Follow up with teams on outstanding entries.

states.name: Check if Confirmation on Entries Status Received
states.description: Evaluate whether entry confirmations received by M+4 deadline.

transitions.condition: Confirmation on Entries Status Received/Entries Posted by M+4
Confirmation on Entries Status not Received/Entries Not Posted by M+4

states.name: Track Entries and Perform Risk Analysis
states.description: Track overdue entries and assess associated risks.

states.name: Update Risk Assessment
states.description: Update risk assessment in working file for tracked entries.

states.name: Check for Unexplained Variances
states.description: Final check: are there variances without adequate explanation?

states.name: Categorize Unexplained Variances
states.description: Classify and document remaining unexplained variances.

states.name: Prepare Summary for Material Variances and Risk
states.description: Consolidate variance analysis, commentaries, and risk into summary report.

states.name: Send For Internal Review
states.description: Submit variance summary to Head of Africa GFS for review.

states.name: Review Internally and Incorporate Changes
states.description: Internal review by Head of GFS; incorporate feedback.

states.name: Send Summary for Inclusion in FORTM Pack
states.description: Submit final TB review summary for FORTM reporting pack.

states.name: Trial Balance Review Completed for Month
states.description: FORTM Pack Summary Sent - cycle complete.

dataObjects.name: MS Excel Variance Analysis File
dataObjects.description: Primary working file for TB variance analysis.

dataObjects.name: Shared Drive
dataObjects.description: Central file storage for TB review artifacts.

dataObjects.name: SC Bridge
dataObjects.description: System bridge for TB data extraction.

dataObjects.name: FORTM Pack
dataObjects.description: Financial Operations Review and Tracking Monthly reporting package.

participants.name: GFS Analyst
participants.description: Performs TB extraction, variance analysis, and summary preparation.

participants.name: Head of Africa GFS
participants.description: Reviews and approves TB summary before FORTM submission.

participants.name: Country Stakeholders
participants.description: Provide variance explanations and entry status confirmations.
